About This Home

Wake up to sweeping Channel Islands views in a Ventura home that balances lifestyle, comfort, and long-term potential. With four bedrooms, three bathrooms, paid-off solar, and space for the future, 176 N Mills Rd offers the kind of flexibility buyers look for when they want a home that feels good now and makes sense later.
